messages.content: Please write a comprehensive guide on how to build a distributed machine learning system. The guide should cover the following topics in detail: 1) Data parallelism vs model parallelism, 2) Parameter server architecture, 3) Ring-allreduce communication pattern, 4) Gradient accumulation and synchronization strategies, 5) Fault tolerance mechanisms, 6) Performance optimization techniques including mixed precision training and gradient compression, 7) Real-world deployment considerations such as network bandwidth, storage systems, and orchestration platforms like Kubernetes. Please provide code examples where appropriate and discuss trade-offs between different approaches.
